hero.title: A production-ready Next.js boilerplate built to make $$$
hero.description: Go from idea to income in record time. A modern boilerplate that saves you weeks of setup so you can spend time building features that actually make money.

features.title: Everything you need to ship fast
features.subtitle: Production-ready features that save you weeks of setup time

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: Built-in auth with Better Auth. Social logins, email verification, and session management ready to go.

payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Stripe and Polar integrations. Subscriptions, one-time payments, and webhooks configured.

database.title: Database
database.description: Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL. Migrations, relations, and type-safe queries out of the box.

uiComponents.title: UI Components
uiComponents.description: Beautiful, accessible components built with Base UI. Dark mode, animations, and responsive design.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Analytics with PostHog. Track user behavior, conversions, and product insights out of the box.

emails.title: Emails
emails.description: Emails with Resend. Transactional emails, templates, and delivery tracking configured.

typescript.title: TypeScript
typescript.description: TypeScript typesafe. Full type safety across your entire stack with zero runtime overhead.

rateLimiting.title: Rate Limiting
rateLimiting.description: Rate limiting with Upstash. Protect your API endpoints and prevent abuse automatically.

vercelAI.title: Vercel AI SDK
vercelAI.description: Build AI-powered applications with Vercel AI SDK. Integrate with OpenAI, Anthropic, and more.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Multi-language support with next-intl. Translate your app and reach global audiences.

aiTools.title: AI Tools
aiTools.description: Integrating in AI tools like Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, and GitHub Copilot for enhanced development.

andMore.title: And More
andMore.description: Plus many more production-ready features and integrations to help you ship faster.

pricing.title: Built for builders who play to win
pricing.subtitle: Launch faster, sell sooner, and grow without fighting setup pain

community.name: Community
community.description: For learners, early builders & indie devs who love to experiment.

features.payments: Payments via Stripe / Lemon Squeezy / Polar

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: For founders & builders ready to ship real products and make money.

testimonials.title: Trusted by developers
testimonials.subtitle: See what builders are saying about our platform

freeVersion.question: What's included in the free version?
freeVersion.answer: Everything you need to build: a full Next.js boilerplate with auth, payments, UI, SEO, and transactional emails. It's free forever under the MIT license.

proVersion.question: What's in the pro version?
proVersion.answer: Pro adds one-click deploys, a CLI tool, advanced auth (roles & invites), automated emails, analytics hooks, lifetime updates, and priority support — built for founders who want to launch fast.

loseAccess.question: Do I lose access to the free version if I don't upgrade?
loseAccess.answer: Nope. The free version stays open source and always available. Pro just saves you time and setup pain.

oneTimePayment.question: Is it really a one-time payment?
oneTimePayment.answer: Yep. $90 lifetime access. No subscriptions, no renewal fees, ever.

commercial.question: Can I use it for commercial products?
commercial.answer: Yes — both free and pro can be used to build and sell your own projects.

bugs.question: What if I find a bug or issue?
bugs.answer: Open an issue on GitHub or drop it in the Discord — we fix bugs fast, and pro users get priority patches + updates.

upgrade.question: Can I upgrade later?
upgrade.answer: Absolutely. You can start free, and when you're ready to go pro, your setup stays compatible.

updates.question: How often do you ship updates?
updates.answer: Bug fixes and small updates drop regularly; pro users get early access to new templates and features.

support.question: What support does pro include?
support.answer: Private Discord, priority replies, and lifetime updates. You'll never be stuck figuring things out alone.

cta.title: Your next product could be live by tonight.
cta.subtitle: Focus on growth while the stack takes care of the heavy lifting
